/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/cube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/cube_mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/fault_formation_terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/ground.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/ground_mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/material.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/midpoint_disp_terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/read_files.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/stb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/texture_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/triangle_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/MyGameInOpenGL/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/dependencies/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/dependencies/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/dependencies/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/dependencies/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/dependencies/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game_on_mac.dir/dependencies/imgui/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o my_game_on_mac  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
